Ghorme sabzi
$17.00

How to prepare Tehrani Qormah Sabzi Stew: First, we have to soak red beans or pinto beans in a bowl of water the night before. If possible, we change the water in the bowl two to three times and pour fresh water until the swelling of the beans is completely removed.

  • onion
  • Meat
  • Beans
  • Salt
Iran, Tehran
2h 0m
